title: Totem of Knowledge
description: The totem of undying now looks like the enchantment table book
body:
# Totem of Knowledge 
Totem of Knowledge is a simpel recourse pack which replaces the rare totem of undying with the enchantment tabel book.
>
![used_totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e55bba9d9999e42399ed7a6eb9c2dbe49b5d2b3.png)
>
![books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e71ddd218231c0cd83ef399e6565f2b4517dcc82.png)

### Now it is not only useful but can also be used for decoration
> 
![witchtable 876 x 492](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd388fcbc2c179a37ff1fdac901cfffbbf082d89.png)
